signal.description: Integrate GSD (Get Shit Done) spec-driven framework for planning artifacts. agentXchain was originally intended to use GSD (https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done) for its planning workflow. Current governed protocol (PM->Dev->QA) works but does not leverage GSD discuss-phase, plan-phase, execute-phase, verify-work, ship workflow or its per-task fresh context approach. Align planning artifacts with GSD structure: per-phase CONTEXT.md, RESEARCH.md, atomic XML PLAN.md, SUMMARY.md, VERIFICATION.md, UAT.md.

evidence.value: GSD framework: https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done. Currently 500+ _SPEC.md files exist (spec-driven) but not using GSD artifact structure or workflow commands. agentXchain has its own governed protocol but missing GSD context engineering layer for fresh sub-agent contexts per task.
